sourceFixMap: FLOW-15-FIXMAP-002: governance risk level re-verify cross-flow governance rules first unblocking step1.
gapFixed: Active coverage docs still described the shelved T201-T240 / 40-contract MVP-builder corpus.
Coverage docs now describe the shipped T605-T608 SaaS multi-tenancy cascade.
Playwright P1 coverage names and screenshot targets now match the shipped T605-T608 states.
Phase 13 report is marked PENDING_RERUN until Phase 2 recaptures the renamed screenshots.

staticGovernanceScan.command: Check engine-bootstrapper imports/spreads SAAS_MULTI_TENANCY_CONTRACT_DESCRIPTORS and SAAS_MULTI_TENANCY_BFA_RULES; check FLOW-15 BFA rules CF-15-1, CF-15-2, CF-15-3, CF-15-4, CF-945, CF-946, CF-947, CF-948 are FLOW-15, FLOW_SCOPED, BUILD_FAILURE; check P1 active rows use T605-T608 and omit stale T201-T240/40-contract active scope.

serverTypeScript.command: Push-Location server; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false; Pop-Location
